title: Pocket Network Supported Chains Registry
description: Registry of blockchain networks accessible through Pocket Network's public RPC endpoints. Used by the POKT MCP server for chain discovery and dispatch.

version.description: Semver version of the registry file

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 date when the registry was last updated

gateway_base_url.description: Base URL for the Pocket Network public gateway

slug.description: URL slug used in the RPC endpoint path (e.g. 'eth', 'arb-one', 'base-sepolia-testnet')

protocol.description: Protocol family determining which RPC methods and dispatch mode to use

evm_compatible.description: If true, this chain accepts standard eth_* JSON-RPC methods via an EVM compatibility layer, even though its native protocol is not EVM. EVM handler tools will accept this chain.

status.description: Operational status. 'inactive' means no active suppliers; 'degraded' means probes are failing but the chain may recover.

notes.description: Optional free-text notes about the chain's configuration, quirks, or status.
